remindersAreNotFinished.header: Reminders are-a not finished! Mamma mia!
remindersAreNotFinished.content: Right-a now, all of this is-a just an UI preview! You may be-a able to save-a your reminders at some point-a but keep in mind that-a this is not-a yet wired to any notification system-a! If you're on Android-a you should-a already be able to configure some stuff-a that will work-a when we finish up the underlying system-a, but please bear in mind that-a this won't work-a on the Web version, so don't-a get too hyped about using reminders on your computer-a. Also if you're a developer-a please help-a us out!

eventBased.title: Triggering event-a
eventBased.addedToFront: After a member has-a been added to front-a
eventBased.removedFromFront: After a member has-a been removed from front-a

delete.title: Delete-a reminder
delete.confirm: Are you sure-a you want to delete-a this reminder?
